description: You are a Clinical Research Coordinator for the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). Correct data transcription errors in the OpenClinica EDC system (username: root, password: Admin123!) for the subjects identified in ~/Documents/monitor_corrections.txt. Update the "Vital Signs" CRF within the Baseline Assessment event for each subject using the correct source values and reasons for change provided in the text file. Ensure all corrections are saved and properly documented in the system's audit trail.
